case_title: DOWNING, ALBERT vs. NEIL, CHARLES et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-02-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON DEC-02-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JAN-06-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
JUDICIAL CASE CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-06-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JAN-06-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE AND SANCTIONS ISSUED FOR PLFF'S FAILURE TO APEAR 1/6/97 AND FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-05-1997 CONTINUED FROM JAN-06-1997 TO FEB-05-1997 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOWNING, ALBERT AS TO DEFENDANT NEIL, CHARLES DOES 1 TO 20 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          DEC-02-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-30-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       NOV-12-1996
